metadata.description: Wei-Hung's developer toolkit — daily reports, README generation, plan validation, and spec analysis skills

plugins.name: daily-report
plugins.description: Generate daily work progress reports from git history

plugins.name: readme-updater
plugins.description: Auto-generate or update README.md from codebase analysis

plugins.name: plan-analyzer
plugins.description: Validate and standardize plan files after plan creation

plugins.name: spec-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyze spec documents, extract DO/DON'T lists and test cases
